race.comment: Plenty of win chances. PARTY DAY (6) is a progressive type in great form and looks hard to beat again. Just missed fresh then then stalk the leader and drew clear late when off the mark here last time. At peak and expected to measure up. CELTIC ROSE (7) resumes without a trial and has placed fresh. Best figures measure right up and has run well here. Drawn for a soft run and will explode late. DINA TYCOON (5) is a former Victorian who has shown good speed lately and looks well placed here with the light weight. Take catching. MEL'S STREET ABOVE (10) is much better than last start. Blinkers on and has since won a trial by a space. Well worth another chance. WILD NIGHTS (11) has ability and looks one of the chances.
